payload.label: clock
payload.long_description: Round wall clock with a dark scalloped (petal-like) wood or metal frame, white face with dark hour markings and two dark hands behind a glossy glass cover; clock is slightly tilted and a bit blurred in the crop and fills most of the frame (approx. 1.5 m away).

message.content: {"label":"clock","short_description":"dark scalloped-frame wall clock","long_description":"Round wall clock with a dark scalloped (petal-like) wood or metal frame, white face with dark hour markings and two dark hands behind a glossy glass cover; clock is slightly tilted and a bit blurred in the crop and fills most of the frame (approx. 1.5 m away).","attributes":["dark scalloped frame","white dial","dark hour markings","two dark hands","glass cover glare","slight blur","tilted orientation","circular shape","wall-mounted"],"distance_from_camera_m":1.5}
